Logged in as: QRZ logout switch account
Welcome to Duelingbook!

We've made some updates to the rules of the site. Click to view the Rules & Punishments.

(9/24/25) You can now duel in Genesys Format and view its cardpool's points in Deck Constructor. For more information, visit https://www.yugioh-card.com/en/genesys/

(11/6/23) Our 2023 Judge Exam is here! If you have at least 100 experience, you can test your ruling knowledge by taking this exam. You can take the exam at https://www.duelingbook.com/judge-exam

(10/22/23) We've added Edison Format to the Duel Room! This is the format that was played at the 75th Shonen Jump Championship in Edison, New Jersey, on April 24th, 2010. You can learn more about Edison Format at https://www.duelingbook.com/edison-format

(4/14/20) We've added ranked sections for Goat Format and Speed Duels! You can find more information about Goat Format here and more info about Speed Duels here.

(4/1/20) We are following the new Master Rule update regarding Special Summoning monsters from the Extra Deck. We are also following new rules related to the activation legality of Trigger effects and various other mechanics.

(11/6/19) Interested in becoming a judge on DB? Now's your chance! If you have attained at least 100 experience, you are ready to take our new Judge Exam

(5/8/19) You can now play in Tag Duels! Here is a guide for how to set them up and play.

(4/16/19) Replays now have the option to show both players' hands!

Also, make sure you're familiar with the site's General Policies

(3/19/19) You can now enter Solo Mode, which starts a game by yourself, with no opponent. Good for testing hands and combos!

(1/30/19) Duelingbook has added a Speed Duel format! In Speed Duels, your deck contains 20-30 cards, and you can use a special skill throughout that game.

(11/19/18) You can now create your own custom cards to use in duels! Check out our new Custom Cards feature.

(10/29/18) You can now search for official tournament stores and regional qualifiers in your area! Try out our new Tournament Locator.

(9/17/18) You can now change your card sleeves! You can unlock more sleeves by gaining more experience. Also, ratings have been reset for the new Forbidden/Limited list.

(8/20/18) You can now take the Judge Exam. If you score well, we may contact you regarding a staff position.

(11/06/17) You can now view replays of your games and watch them over and over again! To see them, scroll down in the main menu and click on Duel Records.

(10/23/17) Check out Duelingbook's new forum! Click the Forum button above to get there.

Tip: If your screen freezes, try resizing your browser window to fix the issue.

QRZ
6 minutes ago
1
I'm hosting a tournament today for the Equilibreo Format which I created!

Equilibreo is a new format with a card pool of roughly 400 cards! Its based on slow, strategic play. There are very few negates, floodgates and monster removals. Every card is designed to give you a small advantage over time. No big explosive plays.
Reply
Delete
Save
QRZ
6 minutes ago
1
Join the Equilibreo discord server: https://discord.gg/6aJRF2ZcX

The entire cardpool and deck constructor is here: https://omartmu.github.io/equilibreo-format/ (export deck when done and import into DB to play)
Delete
Save
Claudio05
5 minutes ago
1
nah I'm good
Delete
QRZ
5 minutes ago
1
The main decks that can be built from this card pool are: Dragons, Spellcasters, Warriors, Heros, Magnet Warriors, Gadgets, WATER (umi), FIRE (laval base), WIND (gusto), Dinos, Zombies, Machines, Burn, Fiend, Rituals and Pile of good generics. Lots of hybrids and deck building is possible.
Delete
Save
QRZ
4 minutes ago
NOTE: It may take 10 seconds to load the first time you open the deck constructor website. No verification needed for account creation, it takes 2 seconds. Just enter any username and password (min. 6 char) and you're good to go immediately.

Contrast.
13 minutes ago
Fun Fact: The reason tokens cannot be used for Xyz material is because Tokens do not have to be card sized, just that they can indicate which mode they're on. Hence you cannot stack Xyz monsters atop them
Reply
Delete
Contrast.
12 minutes ago
Really, most rulings about what Tokens cannot do can be deduced from this point

Speed Duel Showdown #211
by Duelingbook
Starts in 1 day, 11 hours
Signups start in 1 day
Come enter a tourney for Speed Duels, using the new banlist! The winner of this tourney will receive 9 days of customs. All matches are in Speed Duel format. Deck changing is not allowed. Participants must start their matches within 15 minutes each time pairings are posted.
0/16 players
Goat Format Weekly #216
by Duelingbook
Starts in 1 day, 13 hours
Signups start in 1 day
Are you ready to play some Goat Format? The winner of this tourney will receive 15 days of supporter status, with the ability to upload and use custom avatars and sleeves. All matches are played in Goat Format. Deck changing is not allowed. Participants must start their matches within 15 minutes each time pairings are posted. You can find more information about Goat Format here https://www.duelingbook.com/goat-format
0/32 players
HAT Format #6
by Duelingbook
Starts in 2 days, 7 hours
Signups start in 2 days
This format was played at the NAWCQ in July 2014. Popular cards included Hands, Artifacts, and Traptrix. The winner of this tourney will receive 15 days of supporter status, with the ability to upload and use custom avatars and sleeves. All matches are played in HAT Format. Deck changing is not allowed. Participants must start their matches within 15 minutes each time pairings are posted. You can find more information about HAT format here https://www.duelingbook.com/format?f=hat
0/32 players
REDU (Wind-Up) Format #4
by Duelingbook
Starts in 3 days, 12 hours
Signups start in 3 days
Shortly after the set Return of the Duelist was released, duelists played this format at YCS Providence in Oct 2012. The winner of this tourney will receive 15 days of supporter status, with the ability to upload and use custom avatars and sleeves. All matches are played in REDU Format. Deck changing is not allowed. Participants must start their matches within 15 minutes each time pairings are posted. You can find more information about REDU format here https://www.duelingbook.com/format?f=redu

Valkyrion the Magna Warrior[ ROCK / EFFECT ]Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must first be Special Summoned (from your hand) by Tributing 1 "Alpha The Magnet Warrior", "Beta The Magnet Warrior", and "Gamma The Magnet Warrior" from your hand and/or field. You can Tribute this card, then target 1 "Alpha The Magnet Warrior", "Beta The Magnet Warrior", and "Gamma The Magnet Warrior" in your GY; Special Summon them.ATK /3500DEF /3850LINK - 075347539

Magnet Warrior Sigma Plus[ ROCK / EFFECT ]While you control an EARTH monster, your opponent's monsters that can attack must attack EARTH monsters. While your opponent controls an EARTH monster, you choose the attack targets for your opponent's attacks. If this card is sent to the GY: You can target 1 Level 4 or lower "Magnet Warrior" monster in your GY, except "Magnet Warrior Sigma Plus"; add it to your hand or Special Summon it. You can only use this effect of "Magnet Warrior Sigma Plus" once per turn.ATK /1800DEF /1500LINK - 051826619

4
Magnet Bonding[ SPELL CARD    ][ ROCK / EFFECT ]During the Main Phase: Activate 1 of these effects (but you can only use each effect of "Magnet Bonding" once per turn);
● Add 1 "Conduction Warrior Linear Magnum Plus Minus" or 1 Level 4 or lower "Magnet Warrior" monster from your Deck to your hand.
● Add 1 Level 8 "Magna Warrior" monster from your Deck to your hand.
● Fusion Summon 1 Rock Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, by shuffling Rock monsters from your hand, field, GY, and/or banishment into the Deck as material.Once per turn: You can Tribute 1 "Abyss Actor" monster, then target 1 "Abyss Script" Spell in your GY; add it to your hand.33ATK /1500DEF /1800265514302
4
Magnet Reverse[ SPELL CARD    ][ ROCK / EFFECT ]Target 1 of your Machine or Rock monsters, that is banished or is in your GY, that cannot be Normal Summoned/Set; Special Summon it.ATK /1800DEF /1500LINK - 080352158
4
Magnetic Field[ SPELL CARD    ][ ROCK / EFFECT ]If you control a Level 4 or lower EARTH Rock monster: You can target 1 Level 4 or lower "Magnet Warrior" monster in your GY; Special Summon it. You can only use this effect of "Magnetic Field" once per turn. Once per turn, at the end of the Damage Step, when an EARTH Rock monster you control battled an opponent's monster, but the opponent's monster was not destroyed by the battle: You can return that opponent's monster to the hand.ATK /1800DEF /1500304740489
4
Miracle Rupture[ SPELL CARD ][ ROCK / EFFECT ]Send 1 Level 4 or lower Rock monster from your Deck to the GY, then, if "Fossil Fusion" is in your GY, draw 1 card. You can only activate 1 "Miracle Rupture" per turn.ATK /1500DEF /1800244297127
4
Scatter Fusion[ SPELL CARD    ][ ROCK / EFFECT ]During your Main Phase, if your opponent controls a monster: You can Fusion Summon 1 non-Rock "Gem-Knight" monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your Deck as material, also you cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn, except "Gem-Knight" monsters. You can only use this effect of "Scatter Fusion" once per turn. When this card leaves the field, destroy all monsters Summoned by this card's effect.ATK /1800DEF /1500LINK - 040597694
4
Superconductive Plasma Blast[ SPELL CARD    ][ INSECT / FLIP / EFFECT ]Activate the following effect depending on whose turn it is;
● Yours: Place 1 Thunder or Rock monster from your Deck on top of your Deck, then if you have a Thunder or Rock monster in your field or GY, you can destroy 1 card on the field.
● Opponent's: Add 1 Thunder or Rock monster from your field, GY or banishment to your hand, or if a monster(s) was destroyed by battle or card effect this turn, you can add 1 such monster from your Deck instead.
You can only activate 1 "Superconductive Plasma Blast" per turn."Amazoness" monsters you control gain ATK equal to their own Level x 100. When an attack is declared involving your "Amazoness" monster: You can target 1 "Amazoness" Spell/Trap in your GY; add it to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Amazoness Silver Sword Master" once per turn.77ATK /300DEF /1000351869363
4
The Monarchs Masterplan[ SPELL CARD ][ MACHINE / TUNER / EFFECT ]Send 1 "Monarch" Spell/Trap from your Deck to the GY, except "The Monarchs Masterplan". If this card is banished: You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; add 1 monster with the same Attribute that has 2400 ATK/1000 DEF, from your Deck or GY to your hand, then you can apply this effect.
● Immediately after this effect resolves, Normal Summon 1 "Zaborg the Thunder Monarch", "Mobius the Frost Monarch", "Thestalos the Firestorm Monarch", "Granmarg the Rock Monarch", "Raiza the Storm Monarch", or "Caius the Shadow Monarch".
You can only use this effect of "The Monarchs Masterplan" once per turn.When a monster(s) you control is destroyed by a card effect (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your Pendulum Zone. You can only use this effect of "Acrobatic Magician" once per turn.22ATK /0DEF /0LINK - 063899196
4
Triamid Cruiser[ SPELL CARD    ][ THUNDER / EFFECT ]Each time a Rock-Type monster is Normal Summoned, gain 500 LP. If a "Triamid" monster is Normal Summoned: You can draw 1 card, then discard 1 card. If this face-up card in the Field Zone is sent to the Graveyard: You can add 1 "Triamid" monster from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Triamid Cruiser" once per turn.ATK /2400DEF /1000LINK - 045383307
4
Triamid Fortress[ SPELL CARD    ][ MACHINE / EFFECT ]All Rock-Type monsters on the field gain 500 DEF. "Triamid" monsters on the field cannot be destroyed by card effects. If this face-up card in the Field Zone is sent to the Graveyard: You can target 1 "Triamid" monster in your Graveyard; add it to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Triamid Fortress" once per turn.ATK /900DEF /1900LINK - 009989792
4
Triamid Kingolem[ SPELL CARD    ][ MACHINE / TUNER ]All Rock-Type monsters on the field gain 500 ATK. If a "Triamid" monster you control battles, your opponent's cards and effects cannot be activated until the end of the Damage Step. If this face-up card in the Field Zone is sent to the Graveyard: You can Special Summon 1 "Triamid" monster from your hand. You can only use this effect of "Triamid Kingolem" once per turn.ATK /1000DEF /600272772445
4
Triamid Loading[ SPELL CARD    ][ MACHINE / EFFECT ]If a Field Spell is placed face-up in the Field Zone: You can add 1 "Triamid" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand, except "Triamid Loading". If a face-up Rock monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle or an opponent's card effect: You can Special Summon 1 "Triamid" monster with a different name from your Deck. You can only use each effect of "Triamid Loading" once per turn.ATK /900DEF /1900LINK - 064576557

Profile
JOIN the Format discord: https://discord.gg/6aJRF2ZcX
Format Deck Constructor: https://omartmu.github.io/equilibreo-format/
 
Equilibreo Format is a Yu-Gi-Oh! format with a controlled card pool designed for slow-paced, skill-based, and strategic gameplay.
 
Unlike modern formats, Equilibreo avoids power creep, explosive combos, overpowered cards, and excessive removal. Every card is selected to promote careful decision-making, resource management, and meaningful board presence. The format focuses on gradual advantage rather than sudden game-ending plays. Generic negation and oppressive floodgates are avoided entirely. Cards are designed to influence the game through small advantages, making long-term strategy and player decisions the key factors in victory. Search and generic draw power are limited, while recursion and recovery effects support longer, more interactives games, and enable more comebacks.
 
If a deck is built properly, the chance of opening a 'bricky hand' is <5%. Every hand should be playable, because of the small power-gap between the cards. There are no Synchro, Xyz, Link, or Pendulum Monsters.
 
RULES: Equilibreo Format follows standard TCG rules with two exceptions: no Extra Monster Zone, and the first player draws during their Draw Phase.
 
Here is a deck constructor I created specifically for this format (they are the same, try 2nd link):
 
1. https://equilibreo-format.netlify.app/
 
2. https://omartmu.github.io/equilibreo-format/
 
You can export a YDK file of the deck from my website and import it into Duelingbook to play!
 
---
IGNORE WHAT IS BELOW... OLD STUFF lol
---
Here's my new format of pre-constructed decks! Its based on the idea of minimizing luck in yugioh and having the better duelist win 8/10 times. Boss monsters stay on the field longer, and the focus is on having to think before every move. Its even slower than GOAT format but its not boring. You don't blindly make decisions. Every card you play has to be played correctly, because there are limited resources for every deck. its meant to turn yugioh into a chess game, almost. Here are the decks so far:
 
Pretty much finalized:
1. https://www.duelingbook.com/deck?id=20274579 - fiend
2. https://www.duelingbook.com/deck?id=20274347 - blue-eyes
3. https://www.duelingbook.com/deck?id=20258864 - dark magician
4. https://www.duelingbook.com/deck?id=20273546 - warrior
5. https://www.duelingbook.com/deck?id=20323352 - hero
6. https://www.duelingbook.com/deck?id=20323369 - cyber dragon
 
Not finalized:
5. https://www.duelingbook.com/deck?id=20299186 - water
6. https://www.duelingbook.com/deck?id=20306779 - dinos
 
Discord: heartgold1
 
 
New format idea restrictions:
- singleton (max 1 copy per card)
- 1 searcher
- (2 generic 1-for-1 s/t removal) OR (1 generic 1-for-1 s/t removal + 2 restricted 1-for-1 s/t removals)
- lvl4 or lower monsters <= 2000 atk and def
- no special summoning lvl 5+ from deck
- 2 monster destruction effects per deck (also, cannot destroy more than 1 monster per effect)
(so sakuretsu armor is OK, mirror force is NOT)
- 2 special summon from GY per deck (and only 1 monster)
- 2 draw cards per deck (draw 1 per effect)
- no monster with an effect that protects itself from being destroyed by battle without any conditions (holding arms is ok, marshmellon is not)
 
 
 
---
 
 
I'm hosting a tournament today for the Equilibreo Format which I created!
 
Equilibreo is a new format with a card pool of roughly 400 cards! Its based on slow, strategic play. There are very few negates, floodgates and monster removals. Every card is designed to give you a small advantage over time. No big explosive plays.
-
Join the Equilibreo discord server: https://discord.gg/6aJRF2ZcX
 
The entire cardpool and deck constructor is here: https://omartmu.github.io/equilibreo-format/ (export deck when done and import into DB to play)
-
The main decks that can be built from this card pool are: Dragons, Spellcasters, Warriors, Heros, Magnet Warriors, Gadgets, WATER (umi), FIRE (laval base), WIND (gusto), Dinos, Zombies, Machines, Burn, Fiend, Rituals and Pile of good generics. Lots of hybrids and deck building is possible.
-
NOTE: It may take 10 seconds to load the first time you open the deck constructor website. No verification needed for account creation, it takes 2 seconds. Just enter any username and password (min. 6 char) and you're good to go immediately.
